steps.title: Identify the parallel structure requirement
steps.content: The text reads merchants exported salt, textiles, and iron and ______ other valuable commodities. The word and connects two coordinated verbs that must use the same grammatical form.

steps.title: Select the correct verb form
steps.content: imported (B) is the past tense verb needed to parallel exported—both describe actions the merchants performed. The other three options fail the parallel structure requirement by using an infinitive, participle, or perfect participle instead of simple past tense. That matches choice B — B is correct.
